user_claim: Customer: There is a dent along the side of my car. | Support: When did you notice it? | Customer: This morning, after the car had been parked near the gate. | Support: Is it near the front or back? | Customer: It is on the door panel area. I attached two photos from different distances.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The evidence standard is met because img_2 provides clear and relevant evidence of the claimed dent on the door panel.
claim_status_justification: The second image (img_2) clearly shows a dent on the door panel, which matches the user's claim. The first image (img_1) is blurry but does not contradict the claim.
